mapper.sql:
WHERE m.is_active != 2
AND ( m.name ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(m.abbr, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' )
mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS id, m.public_id::text AS publicKey, m.abbr AS abbr, m.name AS name, m.is_active AS isActive, m.created_by AS createdById, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(uc.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(uc.last_name, ''))), ''), uc.username, '' ) AS createdBy, TO_CHAR(m.created_at, 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI') AS created, m.modified_by AS modifiedById, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(um.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(um.last_name, ''))), ''), um.username, '' ) AS modifiedBy, TO_CHAR(m.modified_at, 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI') AS modified FROM modalities m LEFT JOIN users uc ON uc.id = m.created_by LEFT JOIN users um ON um.id = m.modified_by WHERE m.id = #{id} AND m.is_active != 2 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO modalities ( name, abbr, is_active, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{abbr}, #{isActive}, #{createdBy}, #{modifiedBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE modalities SET name = #{name}, abbr = #{abbr}, is_active = #{isActive}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active != 2 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hospital_modality_server_routes route WHERE route.modality_id = modalities.id AND route.is_active = 1 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hospital_dicom_machines machine WHERE machine.modality_id = modalities.id AND machine.is_active = 1 )
UPDATE modalities SET is_active = 2, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active != 2
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT( COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(h.abbr), ''), h.name, 'Hospital #' || h.id::text), ' / ', COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(machine.machine_name), ''), 'Machine #' || machine.id::text), ' -> ', COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(server.name), ''), 'DICOM Server #' || server.id::text) ) AS usage FROM hospital_modality_server_routes route INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg ON cfg.id = route.routing_config_id AND cfg.hospital_id = route.hospital_id AND cfg.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = route.hospital_id INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_servers server ON server.id = cfg.dicom_server_id INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_machines machine ON machine.id = route.machine_id WHERE route.modality_id = #{id} AND route.is_active = 1 ORDER BY usage ASC LIMIT 12

SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT( COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(h.abbr), ''), h.name, 'Hospital #' || h.id::text), ' / ', COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(machine.machine_name), ''), 'Machine #' || machine.id::text), ' (', COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(machine.machine_ae_title), ''), 'AE not set'), ')' ) AS usage FROM hospital_dicom_machines machine INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = machine.hospital_id WHERE machine.modality_id = #{id} AND machine.is_active = 1 ORDER BY usage ASC LIMIT 12

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM modalities WHERE is_active = 1 AND LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
AND id != #{excludeId}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM modalities WHERE is_active = 1 AND LOWER(abbr) = LOWER(#{abbr})
AND id != #{excludeId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM modalities WHERE is_active = 1 AND id IN
#{modalityId}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM hospital_modalities hm INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = hm.modality_id WHERE hm.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND hm.modality_id = #{modalityId} AND hm.is_active = 1 AND m.is_active = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE hospital_modalities SET is_active = 2, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND is_active = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hospital_modalities ( hospital_id, modality_id, is_active, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES
( #{relation.hospitalId}, #{relation.modalityId}, 1, #{relation.createdBy}, #{relation.modifiedBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
ON CONFLICT (hospital_id, modality_id) DO UPDATE SET is_active = 1, modified_by = EXCLUDED.modified_by, modified_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT h.id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, m.id AS modalityId, m.public_id::text AS modalityPublicKey, m.name AS modalityName FROM user_hospitals uh INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = uh.hospital_id AND h.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN hospital_modalities hm ON hm.hospital_id = h.id AND hm.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN modalities m ON m.id = hm.modality_id AND m.is_active = 1 WHERE uh.user_id = #{userId} AND uh.is_active = 1 ORDER BY h.id ASC, m.id ASC
